ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "form_no" TEXT /* Form number assigned to the application */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "fathers_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant's father */,
  "applicant_cnic" TEXT /* National Identity Card number of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "ssc_marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in SSC (Secondary School Certificate) */,
  "ssc_marks_total" INTEGER /* Total SSC marks available */,
  "hssc_marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in HSSC (Higher Secondary School Certificate) */,
  "hssc_marks_total" INTEGER /* Total HSSC marks available */,
  "ssc_board" TEXT /* Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education for SSC */,
  "hssc_board" TEXT /* Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education for HSSC */,
  "ssc_passing_year" INTEGER /* Year of passing SSC */,
  "hssc_passing_year" INTEGER /* Year of passing HSSC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdcat_scores" (
  "mdcat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MDCAT score entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "mdcat_roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number assigned for the MDCAT exam */,
  "mdcat_marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in MDCAT */,
  "mdcat_marks_total" INTEGER /* Total MDCAT marks available */,
  "mdcat_session" TEXT /* Session of the MDCAT exam (e.g., Morning, Afternoon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mdcat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdcat_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_scores" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject score entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "chemistry_marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in Chemistry */,
  "physics_marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in Physics */,
  "bio_marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in Biology */,
  "chemistry_marks_total" INTEGER /* Total Chemistry marks available */,
  "physics_marks_total" INTEGER /* Total Physics marks available */,
  "bio_marks_total" INTEGER /* Total Biology marks available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregates" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregate entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "aggregate_percentage" REAL /* Calculated aggregate percentage of the applicant */,
  "weighted_aggregate" REAL /* Weighted aggregate percentage (including MDCAT score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregates_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admissions officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admissions officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer (e.g., Reviewer, Administrator) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Submitted, Reviewed, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the status was last changed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admissions Officer, Administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interview_result" TEXT /* Result of the interview (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., CNIC, Domicile, SSC Certificate) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File containing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_documents_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)
